]

]

instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data collection",
    DTDFVocab:produced_data LiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

    DTDFVocab:produced_data CameraFeeds
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time data collection",
    DTDFVocab:produced_data VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for real-time data collection",
    DTDFVocab:produced_data SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2",
    DTDFVocab:from_data LiDARPointClouds
]

instance CameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw camera feed data transmitted via ROS2",
    DTDFVocab:from_data CameraFeeds
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data transmitted via ROS2",
    DTDFVocab:from_data VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted via ROS2",
    DTDFVocab:from_data SteeringAngleData
]

instance ACCPerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for operators to monitor ACC performance"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracks displayed in real-time for monitoring"
]

instance DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for developers to troubleshoot"
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D environment visualization for operators"
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC decisions based on lead vehicle distance for speed adjustment",
    DTDFVocab:is_automatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC decisions for emergency braking commands",
    DTDFVocab:is_automatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote management",
    DTDFVocab:is_automatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote management",
    DTDFVocab:is_automatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via remote management",
    DTDFVocab:is_automatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state, object tracks, projected driving path",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceMonitoringInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system offloaded to DT",
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization of environment",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Kalman filter-based object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software stack"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping",
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering and tracking"
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data, object tracks, and timeseries reports",
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:input_to PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:input_to ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (performance class I)",
    DTDFVocab:input_to ACCControlEnabler
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built off Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle, retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, AutonomousVehicleSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlLogicModel, PointCloudClusteringEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals from DT to PT including desired speed commands (converted to motor voltage via Actuation FE), emergency braking commands, and ACC enable/disable commands through the Control Panel UI, with latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (per R8), as required for safety-critical ACC system compliance with 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "During vehicle operation (as operated) for optimization and health monitoring; the case study focuses on operational phase with ACC system implementation, though DTs in automotive are also used in design phase for experimentation and validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-vehicle communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms per R7."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) hosted in cloud; User Entity deployed on remote machines for operator access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs; ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622 standard for performance class I (no road curvature capabilities)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622; latency and clock synchronization requirements address safety aspects; no specific security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
